recent_excerpts: Black Hills Information Security released GoSpoof, a Python tool that opens all ports on a honeypot to capture attacker scanning patterns and payloads in real time.
CVE-2026-25874 (CVSS 9.3) in Hugging Face LeRobot enables unauthenticated RCE via unsafe deserialization.
Elastic Security Labs published an open-source CI/CD abuse detection template using signal extraction and LLM reasoning to catch pipeline attacks across GitHub Actions, GitLab CI,…
